En: ...the wind brushes them off the roof. They're gone.
Zh: ……风把花儿从屋顶上掀起。它们飘走了。

En: Just as you look at the flowers, a gust of wind raises them from the roof, picking them up in the air...
Zh: 你看着那些花儿，一阵风将它们从屋顶掀起，抬升到半空中……

En: You catch a single white flower between your fingers. The rest fly off into the wind. It's a may bell!
Zh: 你用指尖捻起一朵白花，其余的都随风飘散。是铃兰！

En: The young woman looks at the may bell in your hand -- just a glance -- then takes a drag of her cigarette.
Zh: 年轻女子看着你手里的铃兰——只是略微一瞥——然后吸了一口手中的烟。

En: The lieutenant gives you an acknowledging little nod.
Zh: 警督微微点了点头表示认可。

En: Snap your finger pistols at him.
Zh: 用手指朝他比划出手枪的样子。

En: Snap your finger pistols at the young woman.
Zh: 用手指朝年轻女子比划出手枪的样子。

En: Don't snap finger pistols at all.
Zh: 不要用手指比划出手枪的样子。

En: Probably for the best -- your 9mm semiautomatic finger pistols are not a toy to be waved around.
Zh: 也许这样最好——你的9毫米半自动“手”枪可不是随意拿出来到处乱晃的玩具。

En: Your 9mm semiautomatic finger pistols make two satisfying snaps. (Strange for such a small calibre of finger pistol to sound so chunky.) The flower in your hand is impressed. So is she.
Zh: 你的9毫米半自动“手”枪叩出两下令人满意的声响。（很奇怪，这么小口径的手枪居然能发出如此浑厚的声音。）连你另一只手里的花都被惊艳了。她也一样。

En: Your 9mm semiautomatic finger pistols produce a satisfying snap. (Strange for such a low calibre finger-gun to sound so chunky.) The flower in your hand is impressed. So is Kim.
Zh: 你的9毫米半自动“手”枪叩出一下令人满意的声响。（很奇怪，这么小口径的手枪居然能发出如此浑厚的声音。）连你另一只手里的花都被惊艳了。金也一样。

En: That's not actually true -- she's looking toward the yard and doesn't notice them. Which is probably for the best, because didn't someone mention she's a rape victim?
Zh: 其实没这么回事--她看向院子，根本没有注意到。也许这样最好，因为不是有人提到过……她被强暴了？

En: That's not entirely true, the lieutenant is looking at the door to the east and mostly misses them.
Zh: 也不完全是这样，警督正看着东边的那扇门，基本没有注意到。
